participles.neuter: SrAvayAmbaBUvat, SrAvayAmbaBUvad, SrAvayAmAsivat, SrAvayAmAsivad, SrAvayAYcakfvat, SrAvayAYcakfvad

prayoga.literature_text: aho tfptA: sma BadraM te iti SuSrAva
sandeSaM me tadanu jalada Srozyasi Srotrapeyam
deSe tu yadvfttaM tadapi SfRu rAGava
balaM yaTA vfttaM tanme nigadataH SfRu
Sabale kzipraM SrfRu cApi vaco mama
yadAha vacanaM sarvaM SfRu tvaM munipuNgava
tvaM pUjanIyo me SfRu cApyatra kAraRam
idaM tu taTyaM SfRu vE bruvantyA me
kaTaM nu Kalu vAkyaM me SfRuyAt
